title: tanacetum griffithii
intro: Tanacetum griffithii, also known as Griffith's tansy or white tansy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Tanacetum griffithii include reducing pain, easing digestive issues, and acting as a natural insect repellent, due to its volatile oils. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum griffithii are often made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
